language_changed: Language changed. Restart the app to apply changes.
living_header_no_profile: No hunter profile yet — open Profile.
living_header_sanctuary_tooltip: Sanctuary is active: the System will not take gold or XP or apply the penalty zone for overdue quests and failures.
adaptive_calibration_body_easy: Your growth outpaces current trial difficulty — tasks may be too easy.
adaptive_calibration_body_hard: The System detects heavy strain and repeated failures.
adaptive_calibration_effects_hard:
+50% experience (System buff)
Better rare loot odds
Duration: 24 hours
adaptive_calibration_effects_soft:
+30% quest gold
Failure penalties disabled
Duration: 24 hours
home_lock_reward_inventory: In «{feature}»: storage slots, loot sorting, and exchanging drops for System resources.
home_lock_reward_guild: «{feature}»: hub, hall of fame, leaderboards, and co-op challenges beyond this level.
home_lock_reward_dungeons: «{feature}» unlocks dungeons and side activities — timers and special loot.
home_lock_reward_skills: «{feature}»: branches, points, and passives — the full skill tree.
master_thought_low_vitality: Your vessel is drained. Rest, not battle, is advised.
master_thought_high_intellect: Your mind is sharper than a blade today.
master_thought_sanctuary_solo: Your vessel is in stasis. Rest while you can.
master_thought_sanctuary_mage: The Sanctuary barrier holds. Mana is recovering.
master_thought_sanctuary_cultivator: The refuge seals your qi. Breathe — and gather strength.
master_thought_sanctuary_custom: Sanctuary is active. The System grants you a reprieve.
master_command_hint: Type a task and press Enter — e.g. "30 min run"
master_cmd_ph_solo_2: State the goal — the System will log it.
master_cmd_ph_mage_1: Shape your intent in the line of power.
master_cmd_ph_mage_2: Name the task — we’ll weave the reward knot.
master_cmd_ph_cult_2: Write the goal — the Dao reads the rhythm.
master_thought_typing_mind: The mind needs fuel. Good pick.
ai_master_loading_solo_1: Stitching reality protocols to your intent…
ai_master_loading_solo_2: Calibrating rank against the quest draft…
ai_master_loading_mage_0: Reading astral currents around the task…
ai_master_loading_mage_1: Inscribing reward runes along the mana channel…
ai_master_loading_mage_2: Stabilizing the circle — hold your focus…
ai_master_loading_cultivator_0: Measuring the depth of intent and purity of qi…
ai_master_loading_cultivator_1: Listening for the Dao’s whisper in your wording…
ai_master_loading_cultivator_2: Watching the vessel’s breath before empowerment…
low_fx_mode_subtitle: Less blur, grain, and particles — saves battery and runs smoother on older phones.
master_command_auto_description: Task issued from the System command line.
system_philosophy_subtitle: How the system names & explains progress
system_selection_hint: You can change philosophy anytime. It won't delete progress — only meaning and terminology changes.
reset_progress_message: This action will delete all hunter data and quests. Recovery will be impossible.
create_hunter_in_profile: Create a hunter on the "Profile" tab
get_daily_quests: Press the button below to get daily quests
hall_of_fame_subtitle: Search players by Nick#1234 and view profiles
hall_of_fame_search_hint: Enter Nick#1234 or part of a nickname
leaderboards_subtitle: Players & guilds: level, quests, streak, Guild XP
leaderboards_mvp_note: Local MVP: story, wins, and streak boards are built from your save; level may load from Supabase when online. Guild tables use simulation for now; Season is a placeholder until cloud seasons ship.
friend_profile_stub_body: Soon you'll see gear, titles, achievements and activity history here. For now this is a UI skeleton for Supabase `public_profiles`.
no_api_key_message: Please configure API key in settings to generate quests with AI.
inventory_locked_body: Unlocks at level {level}. The System wants to see your first trials completed.
system_welcome:
Welcome, Hunter {name}.

I am the System. I will guide you on the path to power.

Complete quests, gain experience and become stronger.

Your current level: {level}
fail_quest_message: Mandatory quests apply penalties on failure.
penalty_quest_desc_1: Complete 100 squats (or an equivalent the System accepts). No excuses.
penalty_quest_desc_2: 30 minutes phone-free: work or training only. The System is watching.
penalty_quest_desc_3: Run/walk 2 km or 20 minutes brisk walking within 24 hours.
notif_quest_deadline_body_solo: In 2h a contract expires: {title}. Don’t lose the thread.
notif_quest_deadline_body_cultivator: In 2h a trial departs: {title}. Hold your center.
penalty_zone_applied_snack: Penalty Zone: XP debuff and a penalty quest were added.
penalty_zone_active_banner: Penalty Zone active: reduced XP. Complete the penalty quest.
focus_session_hint_closed: Session is locked. Cancel is disabled — keep focus until the timer ends to earn a bonus.
tribulation_desc: You reached a breakthrough threshold (level {level}). Solidify your foundation: complete a hard real-life task and lock in the result. Failure will trigger the Penalty Zone.
custom_system_subtitle: Rename core concepts and pick a rules preset. This affects terminology, AI style, and system priorities.
custom_rules_hint: Preset affects tone and preferences. Reward math stays safe (no sharp changes).
custom_ai_prompt_hint: Describe style briefly. Don't add keys/passwords. Limit: 500 chars.
custom_ai_idea_required: Enter a world idea to generate.
laboratory_locked_hint: Laboratory unlocks at level {level} or after the level-10 story milestone.
laboratory_restricted_banner: Preset-only mode: you can edit terminology and the rules template. Full Laboratory (AI, world visuals, System voice) unlocks at level {level} or after the story_gate_10 milestone.
lore_solo: The System awakens the hunter in you. You grow quickly, but stay true to your goal: discipline turns routine into power.
lore_mage: In the Mage's Codex, reality is a language. You don't just complete tasks — you formulate runes and spells from your habits.
lore_cultivator: The Path of Cultivation demands patience. You strengthen the foundation through silence and trials, until growth becomes inevitable.
lore_custom: Your custom world is born from a grimoire. Tune the terms and principles — and the System will answer your style.
account_body: Sign-in is required so cloud sync can attach your backup to your account.
cloud_sync_need_account: To use cloud sync, you need to sign in.
cloud_sync_body:
Progress is stored on-device (Hive) only. Use JSON export/import in this section.

CloudSyncAdapter (lib/src/services/cloud_sync/) is implemented with Supabase Auth and the game_backups table; without dart-define flags the app stays local-only.
cloud_sync_need_dart_define: Built without Supabase: pass --dart-define=SUPABASE_URL and --dart-define=SUPABASE_ANON_KEY (see README). Local Hive + JSON still works.
cloud_sync_body_short: One progress snapshot per account in game_backups. Restore overwrites local data.
cloud_sync_sign_up_hint: Check your inbox: email confirmation may be required (Supabase Auth settings).
cloud_sync_pull_confirm_body: Local progress on this device will be replaced with cloud data.
cloud_sync_master_push_ok_solo: Your thread is anchored in the network. The System remembers your trail.
cloud_sync_master_push_ok_mage: The scroll reached the ether archives. Knowledge will not fade.
cloud_sync_master_push_ok_cultivator: Your spirit’s imprint reached the clouds. Return — the path is kept.
cloud_sync_master_pull_ok_solo: The contract was pulled from the shadow. Check that the world matches memory.
cloud_sync_master_pull_ok_mage: Fragments returned from distant storage. Align the runes with reality.
cloud_sync_master_pull_ok_cultivator: The breath of the past returned to the vessel. Feel if the flow is whole.
cloud_sync_master_error_solo: The link shivers. Hold focus and retry — the System does not yield first.
cloud_sync_master_error_mage: The channel warped. Wait and try again: magic tolerates pause.
cloud_sync_master_error_cultivator: The stream broke gently. Retry when the mind is still.
manual_quest_ai_balance_failed: Could not balance the quest via AI — slider values were used.
quest_created_ai: Quest created (rewards approved by the System): {title}
blood_moon_active_banner: Anomaly «Blood Moon»: quest failure penalties are doubled and loot rolls skew higher. Ends when the System timer expires.
guild_locked_level: Guild unlocks at level {level}. Complete quests and grow.
laboratory_locked: Creation Lab unlocks at level {level} or after the D-rank story milestone.
guild_need_hunter: Create a hunter in the profile first.
guild_hub_subtitle: A hub for members, chat, raids and leaderboards (coming soon).
guild_hub_stub: This is a local hub for now. Next step: Supabase public profiles + Nick#1234 search.
guild_hub_next_body: Raids (shared goals), hall of fame, friend profiles, and multiverse classes.
world_gates_week_hint: The counter resets every Monday (UTC). Body & sport quests count toward the raid.
world_gates_mvp_note: This is a local prototype: part of the "community" bar is simulated for clarity. Later we'll wire real aggregate progress via the cloud and gate-closing rewards.
guild_focus_raid_tile_subtitle: Monthly focus goal and Guild XP
guild_focus_raid_month_hint: The counter resets each calendar month (UTC). Only a fully completed Meditation skill (focus) timer counts.
guild_focus_raid_mvp_note: Local MVP: part of the community bar is simulated. Guild XP does not reset monthly; the gold bonus already applies when you complete quests.
blood_contracts_coming_body: Pair commitments, shared progress, soft consequences if your partner slips, and nudges will land here. Placeholder per the roadmap.
morale_recovery_desc: The System sees your fatigue. Do one small kind thing IRL: a 10-minute walk, a screen-free comfort drink, or write three gratitudes. Return to hard quests without self-hate.
monarch_mode_active_banner: Monarch Mode is active: you crossed level 50. The System will now open the hardest trials.
awakening_scene_step0: The System has scanned your potential. The first gates are already open.
awakening_scene_step1_hint: Complete any of the three quests tagged «awakening».
awakening_scene_step2_hint: After your start, the System will open the story gates at level 10.
onb_master_validation: Fill in “Who you are” and “What you want to improve” so the Master can initialize you.
onb_done_snack: Initialization complete. Starter quests were added.
lore_portal_typewriter:
The world has changed...

The System has chosen you.

Listen to the silence — your ascension protocol is already pulsing there.
laboratory_master_lock_solo: Your vessel is still too fragile to distort reality. The Laboratory opens once you strengthen the foundation — or complete the first story milestone.
laboratory_master_lock_mage: Your mana channel cannot yet sustain weaving worlds of your own. Return when your level is sufficient — or let the story’s seal lift the barrier.
laboratory_master_lock_cultivator: The Dao abhors haste: the vessel is empty, the root still weak. Temper your base on the path — then heaven’s meridians will show in the Laboratory.
unlock_hint_inventory: Stash unlocked: store loot, swap gear, sell extras.
unlock_hint_guild: Guild hub online: your social layer and shared goals will grow here.
unlock_hint_dungeons: Activities beyond the feed: dungeons and timed runs with special loot.
unlock_hint_skills: Full skill tree: spend SP and shape your build.
sound_effects_subtitle: System sounds for quests, loot, purchases, level-up and overlays (haptics stay on)
manual_quest_help_blurb: Instant local estimate first; with an AI key the System refines rewards in the background.
manual_quest_created_subtitle_ai: Preliminary estimate is local. Syncing with the System…
manual_quest_created_subtitle_no_ai: Local estimate only. Add an AI key in Settings for neural rebalancing.
manual_quest_refined_ai: The System refined quest rewards and tags.
world_journal_hint: Completed quests are counted by tags. From 3 — a System whisper; at 10 — a sealed entry; at 25 — a depth codex. Balance all three axes.
world_journal_snack_tier_whisper: Axis “{axis}”: the System whispers—open the world journal.
world_journal_snack_tier_seal: Axis “{axis}”: the entry is sealed—open the world journal.
world_journal_snack_tier_codex: Axis “{axis}”: the codex deepens—the world journal awaits.
world_journal_whisper_body_solo: Impulse captured. The flesh is listening—don’t ease off.
world_journal_whisper_body_mage: The vessel answers motion: mana seeks an anchor in the body.
world_journal_whisper_body_cultivator: The earth stirs underfoot: your body-axis tally climbs.
world_journal_whisper_mind_solo: The System saw mind spikes. A few more strokes and the pattern will surface.
world_journal_whisper_mind_mage: The grimoire rustles with stray insights—weave them into the channel.
world_journal_whisper_mind_cultivator: Drops of knowledge bead on the scroll; the spirit-mirror clears a little.
world_journal_whisper_focus_solo: Short attention windows logged. Lengthen the thread without tremor.
world_journal_whisper_focus_mage: Sparks of focus beat against time—keep the circle tight.
world_journal_whisper_focus_cultivator: Breath finds rhythm; the world’s noise steps back a span.
world_journal_lore_body_solo: System log: physical discipline is locked in. Ten finished body quests aren’t noise—they’re measurable proof of will in matter. Keep going; every layer hardens your real-world class.
world_journal_lore_body_mage: Grimoire note: the vessel was tempered through motion and daily care. Ten acts of bodily upkeep aren’t trivial—they’re the foundation of a stable mana channel. Without them, life-magic scatters.
world_journal_lore_body_cultivator: Heavenly journal entry: the path of flesh-forging appears. Ten body trials form the first cycle of dao discipline—breath, sleep, and load merge into one qi stream. Don’t break the cycle.
world_journal_lore_mind_solo: System marks an intellect streak. Ten mind quests are strikes against procrastination’s weak point. Learning became your personal dungeon—clear the next floor.
world_journal_lore_mind_mage: A memory-training page is sealed. Ten acts of study and code are woven into grimoire sigils—knowledge is no longer theory; it’s a rune you’ve already spoken into reality.
world_journal_lore_mind_cultivator: Inscription of mental clarity: ten steps of learning polish the “mirror of spirit.” Each paragraph and solved problem is dew on the scroll of fate. The scholar-cultivator’s road opens.
world_journal_lore_focus_solo: System protocol: ten focus acts logged. Your gaze no longer slides—it cuts tasks. That’s how a hunter keeps the thread even in worldly noise.
world_journal_lore_focus_mage: The circle of concentration closed. Ten attention sessions are like holding a stable channel—sparks scatter if the mind wanders. You learned to keep the flame on one point.
world_journal_lore_focus_cultivator: Meditative anchor recorded: ten steadiness practices balanced qi. Outside noise became wind beyond the temple wall—heard, yet unable to shift the center. Preserve that balance.
world_journal_codex_body_solo: S-rank archive: twenty-five body victories turned habit into a passive class trait. You no longer “sometimes train”—matter holds default readiness for the will’s command.
world_journal_codex_body_mage: Grimoire of fullness: twenty-five cycles of bodily care steadied the channel. Mana stopped jittering—daily motion and upkeep became a feeding ritual, not a chore.
world_journal_codex_body_cultivator: Heavenly journal—second forging ring: twenty-five body steps fused sleep, breath, and load into a durable qi stream. Breaking the cycle now hurts worse than fatigue.
world_journal_codex_mind_solo: Deep data layer: twenty-five mind acts turned learning into an automatic procrastination sweeper. The next dungeon floor isn’t a book—it’s the habit of thinking through.
world_journal_codex_mind_mage: Sealed tome of knowledge: twenty-five weavings of study and code built a stable grimoire resonance. Theory and practice merged—each new stroke empowers the previous sigils.
world_journal_codex_mind_cultivator: Scroll of clarity—continuation: twenty-five learning steps polished the spirit-mirror until doubt no longer muddies the water. The scholar-cultivator’s road runs deep, not wide.
world_journal_codex_focus_solo: “Monarch of attention” protocol: twenty-five focus sessions locked the consciousness thread. World-noise stays outside—the gaze cuts the task until it falls.
world_journal_codex_focus_mage: Twin circle of concentration: twenty-five holds kept the flame on one point until the channel self-sustains. A wandering thought now feels like mana bleed.
world_journal_codex_focus_cultivator: Temple inside noisy walls: twenty-five meditative anchors tempered the center so worldly wind cannot shift the core. Balance became second nature, not effort.
quest_empty_story_solo: No story milestones yet. Wait for the System’s call.
quest_empty_story_mage: The grimoire is silent. Seek new knowledge.
quest_empty_story_cultivator: The path of fate hides in the mist.
quest_empty_daily_solo: No targets. The shadow awaits orders.
quest_empty_daily_mage: Grimoire pages are blank. Restore your mana.
quest_empty_daily_cultivator: The path is free of trials. Keep your calm.
quest_empty_master_penalty_solo: Master: silence isn’t safety—only the absence of a ping.
quest_empty_master_penalty_mage: Master: the lattice is calm. Use the lull to bank resonance.
quest_empty_master_penalty_cultivator: Master: karma is clear. Emptiness is still a trial—don’t slacken your root.
quest_empty_master_story_solo: Master: the next milestone arrives when the System deems you ready.
quest_empty_master_story_mage: Master: the grimoire isn’t sealed forever—the key is knowledge you earn today.
quest_empty_master_story_cultivator: Master: mist lifts one step at a time. Don’t force heaven’s script.
quest_empty_master_daily_solo: Master: a hunter without targets rusts. Give yourself one clear order.
quest_empty_master_daily_mage: Master: blank pages want ink—one ritual for today.
quest_empty_master_daily_cultivator: Master: calm isn’t the end of the path. One small act keeps qi flowing.
quest_empty_misc_solo: No special contracts. The signal is quiet.
quest_empty_misc_mage: No unexpected summons. The weave is stable.
quest_empty_misc_cultivator: Heavenly edicts are silent. Keep qi flowing without haste.
quest_empty_master_misc_solo: Master: silence means no urgencies—not permission to idle.
quest_empty_master_misc_mage: Master: when the weave is calm, sketch one unusual ritual anyway.
quest_empty_master_misc_cultivator: Master: without edicts, temper the smallest root habit.
activities_empty_body: Create your first dungeon—a chain of linked quests. Failing a stage closes the Gates and resets that chain’s progress.
vessel_steps_reward_body: The System granted +{exp} EXP for physical activity.
dungeon_gen_loading: The System is shaping the dungeon space…
dungeon_gen_goal_help: What big goal should be split into stages?
dungeon_gen_fallback_description: A trial series generated by the System.
dungeon_blood_gate_full_desc:
WARNING! ANOMALY DETECTED. These are Blood Gates. Contact with the outside world is lost. Rewards are increased. Failure will have severe consequences.

{desc}
dungeon_red_gate_alert_body:
Normal Gates became Blood Gates.
No exit until full clearance.
Stakes are raised.
abyss_portal_subtitle: Beyond the veil there are no promises—only trial. The System waits for your consent.
laboratory_unlock_master_solo: Your vessel has hardened. I have opened the Laboratory—worlds are woven from thought there. Do not rush: every pattern leaves a mark on reality.
laboratory_unlock_master_mage: Your channel holds. The Laboratory awaits—there you draft spell architectures and laws of your realms. Write carefully: mana remembers mistakes.
laboratory_unlock_master_cultivator: Your root has deepened. In the Laboratory you chart the Dao of your own minor heaven. Steady intent—or the backlash scorches the foundation.
quest_success_solo_1: Lock-on: objective closed. Keep climbing—rank abhors emptiness.
quest_success_solo_2: Clean finish. The System notes discipline above the mean.
quest_success_solo_3: Another rung on the ladder you built for yourself.
quest_success_mage_1: Flow contained. Knot closed without leakage—well done, archivist.
quest_success_mage_2: Runes aligned into a clean lattice. I recognize your hand.
quest_success_mage_3: Mana answered. That is a mage’s quiet victory.
quest_success_cultivator_1: Qi completed a cycle without stagnation. The vessel held—good.
quest_success_cultivator_2: Foundation reinforced. Heaven favors those who temper the bone.
quest_success_cultivator_3: Another layer of jade on your will. The path is long—step true.
quest_fail_solo_1: Failure logged. Breathe, stand, return to the fight.
quest_fail_solo_2: A fall is data. The System does not judge—it recalculates.
quest_fail_solo_3: Darkness won a second. That is not a sentence—it is a lesson.
quest_fail_mage_1: The channel wavered. Compress intent and rewrite the knot from zero.
quest_fail_mage_2: Mana scattered. Return to basics—without foundation, the spell lies.
quest_fail_mage_3: The archive keeps failures too. Use them as the draft of the next cycle.
quest_fail_cultivator_1: Qi stalled. Loosen the joint of spirit—tempering without ache is rare.
quest_fail_cultivator_2: Demons of laziness whisper. Silence them with one honest repetition.
quest_fail_cultivator_3: Heaven looks gently but demands grit. Restore the cycle.
